signals.reasoning: BTC is the cleanest long on the board with the strongest mechanical score, negative funding, and price/OI still reading trend-supported rather than exhausted. On a CLEAR board this is the best actual long vehicle again.

ETH still has supportive negative funding, but the price/OI pattern is still short-covering-rally rather than clean continuation, and crowding is already elevated. Good tape underneath, but not as clean as BTC for a fresh long.
SOL is a valid reduced-confidence secondary long with slightly negative funding and trend-supported price/OI. It is not as strong as BTC, but it is clean enough to upgrade on a CLEAR board.
BLAST is improving, but the setup lacks enough reliable OI structure and still looks too thin to trust as a fresh signal. Watch-only.

STBL is now heavily crowded on the long side with strongly positive funding, high OI-to-volume, and elevated overcrowding, so it is too dangerous to chase despite the trend-supported price action. Also too late to short cleanly while momentum is still up.
AZTEC is still too fresh and too execution-sensitive to trust as a new signal. The setup is not differentiated enough versus the stronger names.
MON is stable but not especially compelling, with only mild upside structure and no strong funding edge. That leaves it below the bar for a fresh signal.
PROMPT is crowded on the long side with positive funding and a very high OI-to-volume ratio, but the bearish edge is not clean enough to force a short. Best left alone.

PURR is the clearest short lean on the sheet with strongly positive funding, a distinctly bearish mechanical score, and very crowded positioning. It is still a thinner alt, so confidence stays moderate, but this is the best bearish idea here.
TST is far too extended with positive funding and elevated crowding after the squeeze-style move. Too late to chase and too strong to short cleanly right here.
LDO still has constructive recovery structure, but positive funding and high cascade risk make it a weaker follow-through long than BTC or SOL. Watch-only.
